zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Randolph於1261年之前出生在蘇格蘭度福利爾時，他的父親LORD THOMAS RANDOLPH , LORD CHAMERLAIN OF SCOTLAND31歲，母親Juliana FitzRandolph31歲。他和Isabel Martha Kilconquhar至少有3個兒子和2個女兒。他於1269年在蘇格蘭被列為lord chamberlin of scotland for king alexander iii from 1269 to 1278。他去世於1306年之前在蘇格蘭艾丁波。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Randolph于1261年之前出生在苏格兰度福利爾时，他的父亲LORD THOMAS RANDOLPH , LORD CHAMERLAIN OF SCOTLAND31岁，母亲Juliana FitzRandolph31岁。他和Isabel Martha Kilconquhar至少有3个儿子和2个女儿。他于1269年在苏格兰被列为lord chamberlin of scotland for king alexander iii from 1269 to 1278。他去世于1306年之前在苏格兰艾丁波。

nameMeanings.name: Randolph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and German: from Randolf, an ancient Germanic personal name composed of the elements rand ‘rim (of a shield), shield’ + wolf ‘wolf’. This was introduced into England by the Normans in Old French forms of two different ancient Germanic personal names which became confused with each other: Randulf (from rand ‘(shield-)edge’ + wulf ‘wolf’) and Rannulf (from hraf(a)n ‘raven’ + wulf ‘wolf’).

History: An American family bearing this surname are descended from William Randolph (c. 1651–1711), a planter and merchant, a member of a family that originally came from Sussex, England. William Randolph emigrated from Warwickshire to VA c. 1673. He was a forebear of Thomas Jefferson and Robert E. Lee. Randolph had seven sons, each of whom inherited an estate, the name of which was sometimes added to their own, such as Sir John Randolph of Tazewell. His great-grandsons included Edmund Randolph (1753–1813), first attorney general of the US and one of the framers of the US Constitution, and the diplomat and statesman John Randolph of Roanoke (1773–1833), who served as US minister to Russia.

variants.name: Rand
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Rand, a pet form of Randolf. Compare Randolph , Randall , Randy , and see also Rance .
English: habitational name from Rand (Lincolnshire), Rand Grange (North Yorkshire), or Raunds (Northamptonshire), all of which derive from Old English rand ‘edge, border, rim’.
German: from a short form of any of various ancient Germanic compound personal names formed with rand ‘rim (of a shield)’. Compare 1 above.

variants.name: Randerson
meanings: English (West and East Yorkshire): patronymic from the Middle English personal name Randolf (see Randolph ) + -son. In East Anglia the name may also have been influenced by a form of the now rare or extinct Rendlesham, itself from the place of that name in Suffolk. The placename probably derives from an Old English personal name Rendel (genitive Rendeles) + Old English hām ‘village, homestead’.

variants.name: Randolf
meanings: English and German: variant of   Randolph  .

variants.name: Randall
meanings: English (of Norman origin): common colloquial pronunciation of   Randolph  .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Randolph was born before 1261, in Dumfriesshire, Scotland, his father, LORD THOMAS RANDOLPH , LORD CHAMERLAIN OF SCOTLAND, was 31 and his mother, Juliana FitzRandolph, was 31. He had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with Isabel Martha Kilconquhar. In 1269, his occupation is listed as lord chamberlin of scotland for king alexander iii from 1269 to 1278 in Scotland. He died before 1306, in Edinburgh, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Randolph est né avant 1261, à Dumfriesshire, Écosse, son père, LORD THOMAS RANDOLPH , LORD CHAMERLAIN OF SCOTLAND, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Juliana FitzRandolph, avait 31 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles avec Isabel Martha Kilconquhar. En 1269, sa profession de son indiquée est lord chamberlin of scotland for king alexander iii from 1269 to 1278 à Écosse. Il est décédé avant 1306, à Edinburgh, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Randolph vor 1261 in Dumfriesshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater LORD THOMAS RANDOLPH , LORD CHAMERLAIN OF SCOTLAND 31 und seine Mutter Juliana FitzRandolph 31. Er hatte mit Isabel Martha Kilconquhar mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1269 ist sein Beruf als lord chamberlin of scotland for king alexander iii from 1269 to 1278 in Scotland aufgeführt. Er starb vor 1306 in Edinburgh, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Randolph è nato il prima del 1261 nel Dumfriesshire, Scotland, il suo padre, LORD THOMAS RANDOLPH , LORD CHAMERLAIN OF SCOTLAND, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Juliana FitzRandolph, aveva 31 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie con Isabel Martha Kilconquhar. Nel 1269, la sua occupazione è indicata come lord chamberlin of scotland for king alexander iii from 1269 to 1278 nel Scotland. Morì prima del 1306, nel Edinburgh, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Randolphが1261年以前にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアで生まれた時，父LORD THOMAS RANDOLPH , LORD CHAMERLAIN OF SCOTLANDは31歳，母Juliana FitzRandolphは31歳であった。彼はIsabel Martha Kilconquharとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。1269年，スコットランドでの職業はlord chamberlin of scotland for king alexander iii from 1269 to 1278と記録されている。彼は1306年以前にスコットランドエディンブルグで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Randolph(이)가 1261년 이전 스컷랜드 드프리실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 LORD THOMAS RANDOLPH , LORD CHAMERLAIN OF SCOTLAND(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Juliana FitzRandolph(은)는 31세였다. 그는 Isabel Martha Kilconquhar(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1269년, 그의 직업은 스컷랜드에서 lord chamberlin of scotland for king alexander iii from 1269 to 1278이었다. 그는 1306년 이전 스컷랜드 에딘버그h에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Randolph nasceu antes 1261, em Dumfriesshire, Scotland, seu pai, LORD THOMAS RANDOLPH , LORD CHAMERLAIN OF SCOTLAND, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Juliana FitzRandolph, tinha 31 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas com Isabel Martha Kilconquhar. Em 1269, sua profissão aparece como lord chamberlin of scotland for king alexander iii from 1269 to 1278 em Scotland. Ele faleceu antes 1306, em Edinburgh, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Randolph родился перед 1261 г. в местности думфриессхир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени LORD THOMAS RANDOLPH , LORD CHAMERLAIN OF SCOTLAND было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Juliana FitzRandolph, 31. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери от Isabel Martha Kilconquhar. В 1269 году он работал по профессии lord chamberlin of scotland for king alexander iii from 1269 to 1278 в местности Шотландия. Он умер перед 1306 г. в местности эдинбург, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Randolph nació antes de 1261, en Dumfriesshire, Scotland, su papá, LORD THOMAS RANDOLPH , LORD CHAMERLAIN OF SCOTLAND, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Juliana FitzRandolph, tenía 31 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas con Isabel Martha Kilconquhar. En 1269, su ocupación registrada era lord chamberlin of scotland for king alexander iii from 1269 to 1278 en Scotland. Murió antes de 1306, en Edinburgh, Scotland.
